title: Guard compilation + schema re-elaboration
analysis:
This task implements guard compilation and schema re-elaboration for the Reify CAD language. Guards (where clauses) conditionally include/exclude declarations from the evaluation graph based on boolean expressions.

Current State: reify-syntax already defines GuardedGroupDecl with condition, members, else_members (AST). ParamDecl, LetDecl, ConstraintDecl have where_clause: Option<WhereClause>. The compiler has a no-op stub for GuardedGroup (line 807-810). TopologyTemplate has no guard fields. EvaluationGraph has value_cells, constraints, realizations, resolutions PersistentMaps. DeterminacyState has Determined, Undetermined, Provisional, Auto.

Approach: Compiler side adds CompiledGuardedGroup struct, guarded_groups and structure_controlling to TopologyTemplate. Implements per-declaration guards, block guards, nested guards (conjunction), else blocks, and reference safety. Eval side extends from_templates() and Engine::eval() for guard-conditional member evaluation, and Engine::edit_param() for re-elaboration when guards change.

prerequisites.description: Add CompiledGuardedGroup struct and extend TopologyTemplate with guarded_groups: Vec<CompiledGuardedGroup> and structure_controlling: HashSet<ValueCellId> in reify-compiler/src/lib.rs. Update compile_structure() to initialize empty defaults. Update content_hash. Ensure existing tests compile.

Add guarded_group() builder method to TopologyTemplateBuilder in reify-test-support/src/builders.rs. Store guarded_groups and structure_controlling in builder; include in build() with proper content_hash.
Add GuardedGroupInfo struct and guarded_groups/structure_controlling fields to EvaluationGraph in reify-eval/src/graph.rs. Update topology_fingerprint() and Default.
Create test files: crates/reify-compiler/tests/guard_compilation.rs and crates/reify-eval/tests/guard_eval.rs with basic imports. Verify cargo test --no-run succeeds.

steps.description: Write failing test: compile_param_with_where_clause. Parse source with per-declaration where clause. Assert guarded_groups has 1 entry, guard references 'active', member is x, guard_value_cell in structure_controlling, x NOT in top-level value_cells.
Implement per-declaration guard compilation. Check where_clause on ParamDecl/LetDecl/ConstraintDecl. Create synthetic guard ValueCell, CompiledGuardedGroup, add to structure_controlling.
Write failing test: compile_block_guard. Parse source with GuardedGroupDecl containing two params and one constraint. Assert single guarded_group with 2 members and 1 constraint.
Implement block guard compilation. Replace no-op GuardedGroup arm. Compile condition, create guard ValueCell, compile members/constraints into group.
Write failing test: compile_nested_guards. Assert inner group's guard_expr is BinOp::And(outer_guard, inner_condition).
Implement nested guard conjunction with outer_guard parameter. Inner guard = And(ValueRef(outer), inner_cond).
Write failing test: compile_else_block. Assert guarded_groups[0] has members=[a] and else_members=[b].
Implement else block compilation. Compile GuardedGroupDecl.else_members into else_members/else_constraints.
Write failing test: reference_safety_unguarded_to_guarded_error. Unguarded let references guarded param. Assert error diagnostic.
Implement reference safety. Extend CompilationScope names to include guard context. Check in compile_expr Ident arm.
Write test: reference_safety_same_guard_ok. Both cells under same guard. Assert no error diagnostics.
Ensure same-guard references pass. Fix conjunction containment check edge cases.
Write failing test: eval_guard_true_includes_members. Guard=true, assert guarded member x evaluated to 0.005 SI.
Implement guard processing in from_templates() and eval(). Create guard nodes, conditionally evaluate members based on guard value.
Write failing test: eval_guard_false_includes_else. Guard=false, assert else_member y=0.01 and x=Undef.
Implement guard=false path. Evaluate else_members, set members to Undef/Undetermined.
Write failing test: eval_guard_undef_indeterminate. Guard depends on Auto/Undef param. Assert all members Undef/Undetermined.
Handle guard=Undef. All guarded and else members set to Undef/Undetermined.
Write failing test: guard_change_re_elaboration. eval() with guard=true, then edit_param to false. Assert topology_fingerprint changed, x=Undef, y present.
Implement re-elaboration in edit_param(). Detect structure_controlling changes, re-evaluate guard branches, update topology_fingerprint.

design_decisions.decision: Synthetic guard ValueCells use naming '{entity}.__guard_{index}' with Bool type and Let kind
design_decisions.rationale: Guard expressions need evaluation like any other expression. Double-underscore naming avoids user name collision. Let kind integrates with existing evaluation infrastructure.

design_decisions.decision: Per-declaration where clauses desugar to single-member CompiledGuardedGroups
design_decisions.rationale: Unifies per-declaration and block guards into one representation for the eval engine.

design_decisions.decision: Nested guards compose via conjunction (AND) into separate guard ValueCells per level
design_decisions.rationale: Task spec: 'inner guard = outer_guard && inner_condition'. Each level gets own synthetic guard cell.

design_decisions.decision: Else members stored in CompiledGuardedGroup.else_members, not separate negated groups
design_decisions.rationale: Structural mutual exclusivity guaranteed. Eval selects members when true, else_members when false.

design_decisions.decision: Reference safety uses guard ValueCellId equality for v0.1
design_decisions.rationale: Task spec: 'syntactic equality or conjunction containing the guard'. ID comparison suffices.

design_decisions.decision: All guarded members exist in EvaluationGraph; eval conditionally activates
design_decisions.rationale: Simplifies dependency tracking. Inactive members set to Undef. PersistentMap makes clones cheap.

design_decisions.decision: Topology fingerprint includes guard cell values for schema change detection
design_decisions.rationale: Guard true->false changes effective topology. Fingerprint must reflect this for downstream consumers.

reuse.how: Reuse directly for WhereClause.condition and GuardedGroupDecl.condition.
Extend names map to include guard context for reference safety.
Use for nested guard conjunction and guard ValueRefs.
Use in all eval guard tests.

reuse.what: Expression builder helpers (literal, value_ref, and, not)
reuse.how: Construct guard condition expressions in tests.
Guard cells in Let pass; conditional member eval added after.
